DEF CON Bahrain 2025 Machine-Readable Data

DEF CON Bahrain 2025 data is published as static JSON and fetched by the web app at runtime. These JSON files are the authoritative sources for agents, crawlers, and search systems. Files may be replaced as conference information changes without rebuilding the site.

Primary Endpoints

  • Manifest JSON
  • Schedule JSON
  • People JSON
  • Locations JSON
  • Organizations JSON
  • Search index JSON

Supporting Data

  • Tag IDs by label JSON
  • Articles JSON
  • Content JSON
  • Documents JSON
  • Tags JSON
  • Events by day index JSON
  • Events by tag index JSON
  • Content cards JSON
  • Documents list JSON
  • Organization cards JSON
  • People cards JSON
  • Tag browse JSON

Structure

Data lives under /ht/defconbahrain2025/. Entity files contain canonical records, index files map relationships for navigation, view files are precomputed lists for the client UI, and derived files provide app metadata.

Human Pages

  • DEF CON Bahrain 2025 home
  • Schedule
  • Speakers
  • Locations
  • Villages
  • Search
